name: axctl-monorepo
description: Axis camera analytics suite — CLI, MCP server, macOS apps
author: Matthew Visher

scripts.build:all: bun run build:macos-arm64 && bun run build:macos-x64 && bun run build:linux-arm64 && bun run build:linux-x64 && bun run build:windows-x64
scripts.release: bun run build:all && cd dist && for f in axctl-*; do [[ "$f" == *.tar.gz ]] && continue; [[ "$f" == *.sha256 ]] && continue; [[ "$f" == *.zip ]] && continue; if [[ "$f" == *.exe ]]; then zip "${f%.exe}.zip" "$f" && echo "✓ ${f%.exe}.zip"; else tar -czf "$f.tar.gz" "$f" && echo "✓ $f.tar.gz"; fi; done
scripts.release:checksums: cd dist && shasum -a 256 axctl-*.tar.gz axctl-*.zip 2>/dev/null > checksums.sha256 && cat checksums.sha256
